text: Key growth drivers for Amazon center on AWS cloud services and the advertising business, both identified as high-margin segments supporting earnings expectations [f3922ad9-85d8-409b-916a-444e08a6a248]. AWS provides compute, storage, database, analytics, and machine learning services to enterprises, representing a critical profit driver within the three-segment structure [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. The advertising business complements the retail ecosystem by enabling sellers and brands to reach customers across Amazon's platforms [43e13619-4c35-4dd4-a32b-ceaa18319a42]. Amazon was among the 'Magnificent Seven' technology companies reporting earnings in late July 2025, with combined market capitalization of approximately $11.3 trillion for the group facing investor scrutiny [95e75447-3c30-49f6-861e-b4c471cfa261, 7b554a0d-5f93-4e3a-8dd1-6077bc1dbb47]. Evidence on specific advertising revenue figures, AWS growth rates, and detailed segment profitability is not provided in the available data.
